name: Church Attendance Analysis Report
query:
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%%d-%%m-%%Y') AS `Service Date ::120`,
    day AS `Wk Day ::80`,
    programme AS `Service ::120`,
    branch AS `Branch ::120`,
    men AS `Men ::80`,
    women AS `Women ::80`,
    children AS `Children ::80`,
    total AS `Total ::80`,
    new_men AS `New Men ::100`,
    new_women AS `New Women ::100`,
    new_children AS `New Children ::100`,
    new_total AS `New Total ::100`,
    existing_men AS `Existing Men ::100`,
    existing_women AS `Existing Women ::100`,
    existing_children AS `Existing Children ::100`,
    existing_total AS `Total Existing Member ::100`
FROM
    `tabChurch Attendance Analysis`
WHERE
    `date` >= %(start_date)s
    AND `date` <= %(end_date)s
    AND `branch` = %(branch)s
ORDER BY
    `date`
